text: Welcome to the community, @helper_alex! 🎉 You've been approved as a moderator. Thanks for volunteering to help keep our space safe and welcoming!
Welcome to the team, @mentor_lina! 🎉 We're thrilled to have you as a mentor. Your guidance will help shape our community!
Welcome aboard, @guide_sam! 🎉 You're now an event helper. Looking forward to your contributions to our community events!
